description_long: This is a sleek, blue Audi coupe car adorned with various graphic decals, including a prominent animal-themed design on the hood and roof. The car features a low, aerodynamic profile with a sharply sloped windshield and a smooth, continuous roofline. The front grille is distinctively Audi, with the recognizable four-ring logo and a detailed license plate. The side view reveals two doors, flush handles, and dark-tinted windows, while the wheels are a striking dark blue with a sporty, multi-spoke design. The rear of the car displays quad exhaust pipes, a yellow license plate, and additional graphic detailing on the trunk. The overall appearance is sporty and modern, with a glossy finish and high attention to detail in both form and decoration.
description: A blue Audi coupe car with animal-themed decals, sporty dark blue wheels, and a sleek, aerodynamic design. The car features two doors, tinted windows, and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Audi grille, animal decal on the hood, and detailed license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door coupe profile, blue wheels, and side decal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying quad exhausts, yellow license plate, and a graphic on the trunk.
description_view_3: Right side view with similar coupe profile, blue wheels, and a different side decal.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
